specs.title: newsletter subscribe opens the confirmation dialog

error.message:
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible()

Call log:
  - waiting for getByRole('dialog', { name: 'Confirm subscription' })
  - the preceding click on getByRole('button', { name: 'Subscribe' }) was reported as completed
  - the page is a server-rendered Next.js route; the click fired immediately after page.goto('/') while React hydration was still in progress
  - failure screenshot shows the page fully painted with the Subscribe button visible
